user_request: The bike squadron demands guidance for pre-flight
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The bike squadron demands guidance for pre-flight

### TOPIC
bike squadron pre-flight

### COMPONENT
bike squadron

### OPERATION
pre-flight

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- bike squadron
- pre-flight

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed be the bike squadron, machines of velocity and thunder!
Congregation: We invoke the Omnissiah's grace upon the bike squadron.
Priest: First, inspect all fuel conduits and ignition coils with reverent scrutiny.
Congregation: The bike squadron shall answer our pre-flight invocation!
Priest: Second, verify tire pressures and brake-servo functionality through blessed calibration.
Congregation: Machine Spirits guide the bike squadron's sacred ascent!
Priest: Third, execute final diagnostics upon all weapon-mounts and targeting augurs.
Congregation: Praise the Omnissiah! The bike squadron is prepared!

user_request: Emergency rite: hydraulic press requires operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: hydraulic press requires operation

### TOPIC
hydraulic press operation

### COMPONENT
hydraulic press

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- hydraulic press
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Hear us, O Machine Spirit of the hydraulic press, ancient and mighty!
Congregation: We commence the sacred operation of the hydraulic press.
Priest: First, purge all air from the pressure manifolds with careful deliberation.
Congregation: The hydraulic press responds to our blessed ministrations!
Priest: Second, engage the pump apparatus and monitor pressure gauges with unwavering attention.
Congregation: Omnissiah, grant the hydraulic press steadfast function!
Priest: Third, apply controlled compression force upon the designated workpiece with sacred precision.
Congregation: Thus the hydraulic press fulfills its holy purpose!

user_request: Blessing for the hull breach during sealing
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the hull breach during sealing

### TOPIC
hull breach sealing

### COMPONENT
hull breach

### OPERATION
sealing

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- hull breach
- sealing

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: O Machine Spirit, seal this hull breach with your divine mercy!
Congregation: We invoke the sealing rites upon the hull breach.
Priest: First, deploy emergency bulkhead protocols and isolate the compromised hull breach sector.
Congregation: The hull breach shall yield to our faithful sealing!
Priest: Second, apply polymeric sealant compounds to the hull breach aperture with reverent precision.
Congregation: Omnissiah, grant this hull breach eternal closure!
Priest: Third, reinforce with ferrosteel plates and activate the hull breach's auto-repair systems.
Congregation: The hull breach is sealed! Praise be to the Machine Spirits!

user_request: Prayer for drop pod descent prep of the drop pod descent prep
training_prompt:
### REQUEST

### TOPIC
drop pod descent prep

### COMPONENT
drop pod descent prep

### OPERATION
drop pod descent prep

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- drop pod descent prep
- drop pod descent prep

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed drop pod descent prep, instrument of righteous descent!
Congregation: We sanctify the drop pod descent prep with sacred invocation.
Priest: First, verify all retro-thruster ignition systems within the drop pod descent prep matrix.
Congregation: The drop pod descent prep shall deliver us unto glory!
Priest: Second, calibrate inertial dampeners and stabilization gyroscopes of the drop pod descent prep.
Congregation: Machine Spirits guide the drop pod descent prep's plummeting trajectory!
Priest: Third, seal all entry hatches and activate targeting augurs for the drop pod descent prep.
Congregation: The drop pod descent prep is consecrated and ready!

user_request: My lasgun is failing during power cell insertion — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My lasgun is failing during power cell insertion — help

### TOPIC
lasgun power cell insertion

### COMPONENT
lasgun

### OPERATION
power cell insertion

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- lasgun
- power cell insertion

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: O sacred lasgun, hear our supplication and restore your righteous fury!
Congregation: We perform the power cell insertion blessing upon the lasgun.
Priest: First, examine the power cell receptacle within the lasgun for corrosion and debris.
Congregation: The lasgun hungers for revitalizing energy!
Priest: Second, insert the fresh power cell into the lasgun's chamber with careful reverence and audible confirmation.
Congregation: Omnissiah, restore the lasgun's devastating potential!
Priest: Third, cycle the charging mechanism and verify the lasgun's readiness through test-firing protocols.
Congregation: The lasgun is blessed anew! Ready to smite the unworthy!

user_request: Prayer for startup of the diesel engine
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for startup of the diesel engine

### TOPIC
diesel engine startup

### COMPONENT
diesel engine

### OPERATION
startup

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- diesel engine
- startup

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Mighty diesel engine, awaken from your mechanical slumber!
Congregation: We invoke the startup rites upon the diesel engine.
Priest: First, verify all fuel injectors and compression chambers within the diesel engine are clear and functional.
Congregation: The diesel engine stirs to life!
Priest: Second, engage the starter motor and prime the diesel engine's fuel distribution system with blessed patience.
Congregation: Machine Spirits kindle the diesel engine's internal inferno!
Priest: Third, monitor oil pressure and temperature gauges as the diesel engine achieves full operational warmth.
Congregation: The diesel engine roars! Omnissiah be praised!

user_request: Blessing for the fire suppression system during operation

### REQUEST

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
call_response

- fire suppression system
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: O fire suppression system, guardian against the daemon-flames of perdition!
Congregation: We sanctify the operation of the fire suppression system.
Priest: First, inspect all nozzle apertures and pressure vessels within the fire suppression system for integrity.
Congregation: The fire suppression system stands vigilant!
Priest: Second, activate the fire suppression system's detection augurs and pressurize the chemical reservoirs with reverent care.
Congregation: Omnissiah, grant the fire suppression system swift and merciful action!
Priest: Third, perform discharge tests upon the fire suppression system to ensure blessed functionality in crisis.
Congregation: The fire suppression system is consecrated and ready!

user_request: Blessing for the battery during diagnostics
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the battery during diagnostics

### TOPIC
battery diagnostics

### COMPONENT
battery

### OPERATION
diagnostics

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- battery
- diagnostics

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed battery, source of divine electrical essence!
Congregation: We perform the diagnostics rite upon the battery.
Priest: First, measure the battery's voltage output and amperage capacity with sacred instruments of measurement.
Congregation: The battery reveals its true nature!
Priest: Second, inspect the battery's terminals and connections for oxidation and corrosion with meticulous scrutiny.
Congregation: Machine Spirits illuminate the battery's condition!
Priest: Third, conduct load-testing upon the battery and record all diagnostics within the holy data-slate.
Congregation: The battery is assessed! Omnissiah grant it continued service!

prayer:

Priest: First, calibrate all frequency oscillators and signal amplifiers within the vox-caster with blessed precision.
Congregation: The vox-caster resonates with holy purpose!

Congregation: Machine Spirits grant the vox-caster crystalline clarity!

Congregation: The vox-caster is tuned! Omnissiah hears our voice!

user_request: My solar panel alignment is failing during operation — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My solar panel alignment is failing during operation — help

### TOPIC
solar panel alignment

### COMPONENT
solar panel alignment

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- solar panel alignment
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: O solar panel alignment, collector of the Emperor's blessed photons!
Congregation: We restore the operation of the solar panel alignment through sacred realignment.
Priest: First, measure the solar panel alignment's angular deviation and bearing upon the celestial sphere.
Congregation: The solar panel alignment seeks the light!
Priest: Second, engage the servo-motors governing the solar panel alignment and adjust its orientation with reverent calculation.
Congregation: Machine Spirits guide the solar panel alignment toward solar grace!
Priest: Third, verify the solar panel alignment's efficiency output and lock all mounting servos in blessed position.
Congregation: The solar panel alignment is restored! Omnissiah's light flows eternal!
